---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in Blitz
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or screen recordings if available.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | macOS / Windows / Linux (and version) |
| Blitz Version | e.g. v0.1.0 |
| Architecture | arm64 / x86_64 |

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (logs, console output, etc.).
